queries.pubmed_query: (precision livestock farming OR smart farming OR digital agriculture OR precision agriculture) AND (adoption OR acceptance OR uptake OR diffusion OR implementation) AND (barrier* OR challenge* OR obstacle* OR factor* OR perception* OR willingness OR "technology acceptance" OR "diffusion of innovation")
queries.arxiv_query: (precision livestock farming OR smart farming OR digital agriculture) AND (adoption OR acceptance OR barrier OR perception)
queries.openalex_query: precision livestock farming technology adoption barriers acceptance farmer perception
queries.mdpi_query: precision livestock farming adoption barriers farmer perception
queries.springer_query: (precision livestock farming OR smart farming) AND (adoption OR acceptance) AND (barrier* OR perception* OR "technology acceptance")

criteria.include:
- Animals: cattle, swine, poultry, sheep, goats, or general livestock
- Focus: identifies, discusses, or analyzes barriers (technical, economic, socio-cultural, regulatory) to the adoption or implementation of Precision Livestock Farming (PLF) or smart farming technologies
- Study type: ANY of the following are eligible — surveys, qualitative studies, quantitative studies, economic analyses, case studies, technology acceptance model (TAM) studies, diffusion-of-innovation studies, position papers, narrative reviews, systematic reviews, scoping reviews
- Year: 2015 or later
criteria.exclude:
- Studies focused exclusively on technical sensor or AI development WITHOUT discussing adoption, implementation, or barriers
- Studies on non-livestock animals (wildlife, pets, aquatic animals, insects)
- Papers on crop farming or aquaculture only (no livestock component)
- Publications prior to 2015
- Editorials, news pieces, or short opinion pieces (under ~3 pages)
